news.title:
IDFC First faces ₹780-cr fraud involving Haryana govt, Chandigarh MC funds.
12 arrests made in major scam linked to city branch operations.
news.summary:
IDFC First faces ₹780-cr fraud involving Haryana govt, Chandigarh MC funds.
12 arrests made in major scam linked to city branch operations.

news.title:
Investigators uncovered a Rs 590 crore scam at IDFC First Bank involving fake companies and manipulated transactions.
Accused diverted government funds using forged memos, fake statements, and unauthorized departmental transfers.
news.summary:
Investigators uncovered a Rs 590 crore scam at IDFC First Bank involving fake companies and manipulated transactions.
Accused diverted government funds using forged memos, fake statements, and unauthorized departmental transfers.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank shifts from expensive to fair valuation amid price correction.
Investors reassess its price based on mixed financials and market benchmarks.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank shifts from expensive to fair valuation amid price correction.
Investors reassess its price based on mixed financials and market benchmarks.

news.title:
EOW registers FIR over Rs 75cr transaction irregularities linked to IDFC First Bank.
Complaint lodged by CREST highlights alleged mismatch in the transactions.
news.summary:
EOW registers FIR over Rs 75cr transaction irregularities linked to IDFC First Bank.
Complaint lodged by CREST highlights alleged mismatch in the transactions.

news.title:
ACB arrests Ankur Sharma in ₹590 crore IDFC First Bank fraud.
Sharma, a Chandigarh resident, is linked to the alleged fraud case.
news.summary:
ACB arrests Ankur Sharma in ₹590 crore IDFC First Bank fraud.
Sharma, a Chandigarh resident, is linked to the alleged fraud case.

news.title:
ED investigates IDFC First Bank over fraud case involving fund diversion to gold and real estate.
Links to shell firms and small jewelry businesses uncovered in the investigation.
news.summary:
ED investigates IDFC First Bank over fraud case involving fund diversion to gold and real estate.
Links to shell firms and small jewelry businesses uncovered in the investigation.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank faces investigation by India's financial crime agency over alleged fraud.
Concerns raised about governance and operational integrity amid the probe.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank faces investigation by India's financial crime agency over alleged fraud.
Concerns raised about governance and operational integrity amid the probe.

news.title:
Economists foresee limited impact of imported inflation on CPI due to fiscal measures but WPI may rise from fuel price hikes.
Bank of Baroda expects 150 basis points WPI jump if fuel prices rise; IDFC First Bank highlights CPI's low imported component at 6.84%.
news.summary:
Economists foresee limited impact of imported inflation on CPI due to fiscal measures but WPI may rise from fuel price hikes.
Bank of Baroda expects 150 basis points WPI jump if fuel prices rise; IDFC First Bank highlights CPI's low imported component at 6.84%.

news.title:
ED searched 19 locations over ₹590 crore fraud involving Haryana govt accounts at IDFC First Bank.
The searches took place in Haryana and Chandigarh on March 11, 2026, as per sources.
news.summary:
ED searched 19 locations over ₹590 crore fraud involving Haryana govt accounts at IDFC First Bank.
The searches took place in Haryana and Chandigarh on March 11, 2026, as per sources.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank confirms claims stem from a previous branch incident, not new.
Bank commits to recovering funds and taking action against perpetrators.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank confirms claims stem from a previous branch incident, not new.
Bank commits to recovering funds and taking action against perpetrators.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank pays ₹645 Cr for Chandigarh claims, ₹55 Cr above estimate.
Total deposits steady at ₹2,92,381 Cr as of Feb 28, 2026.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank pays ₹645 Cr for Chandigarh claims, ₹55 Cr above estimate.
Total deposits steady at ₹2,92,381 Cr as of Feb 28, 2026.

news.title:
Haryana Vigilance investigates ₹590-cr IDFC Bank fraud, freezing multiple accounts.
Public can appeal if their accounts are mistakenly frozen during the probe.
news.summary:
Haryana Vigilance investigates ₹590-cr IDFC Bank fraud, freezing multiple accounts.
Public can appeal if their accounts are mistakenly frozen during the probe.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank valuation shifts from fair to expensive, reducing price attractiveness.
P/E and P/BV ratios exceed historical and peer averages, Mojo Grade downgraded to Hold.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank valuation shifts from fair to expensive, reducing price attractiveness.
P/E and P/BV ratios exceed historical and peer averages, Mojo Grade downgraded to Hold.

news.title:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.
news.summary:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.

news.title:
₹6,000 Cr frauds in IDFC First Bank, PNB, SBI raise concerns over governance and risk controls.
IDFC faces Rs 590 Cr fraud; PNB reports Rs 2,434 Cr loss; SBI flags RCom's Rs 700 Cr diversion.
news.summary:
₹6,000 Cr frauds in IDFC First Bank, PNB, SBI raise concerns over governance and risk controls.
IDFC faces Rs 590 Cr fraud; PNB reports Rs 2,434 Cr loss; SBI flags RCom's Rs 700 Cr diversion.

news.title:
ED probes IDFC Bank fraud involving Rs 590 crore linked to Haryana govt.
Haryana Vigilance intensifies investigation; ED seeks FIR copy for further action.
news.summary:
ED probes IDFC Bank fraud involving Rs 590 crore linked to Haryana govt.
Haryana Vigilance intensifies investigation; ED seeks FIR copy for further action.

news.title:
Fraud at IDFC First Bank highlights survival challenges in Indian banking.
HDFC Bank emerged as the largest private bank after absorbing weaker peers.
news.summary:
Fraud at IDFC First Bank highlights survival challenges in Indian banking.
HDFC Bank emerged as the largest private bank after absorbing weaker peers.

news.title:
Keynote Capitals Ltd issued a Sell report on IDFC First Bank.
Current market price of IDFC First Bank is Rs.73.5 as of Feb 27, 2026.
news.summary:
Keynote Capitals Ltd issued a Sell report on IDFC First Bank.
Current market price of IDFC First Bank is Rs.73.5 as of Feb 27, 2026.

news.title:
Probe reveals Rs 590 crore fraud at IDFC First Bank; Rs 25 crore diverted using forged cheques.
SIT investigates Rs 46.56 crore transfers; suspects forged IAS officer signatures on cheques and debit notes.
news.summary:
Probe reveals Rs 590 crore fraud at IDFC First Bank; Rs 25 crore diverted using forged cheques.
SIT investigates Rs 46.56 crore transfers; suspects forged IAS officer signatures on cheques and debit notes.

news.title:
BoFA downgraded IDFC First Bank to 'neutral' from 'outperform', cutting its price target to ₹75 from ₹95.
A ₹590 crore fraud disclosure led to a 20% stock drop; analysts predict disruptions to CASA, deposit, and loan growth.
news.summary:
BoFA downgraded IDFC First Bank to 'neutral' from 'outperform', cutting its price target to ₹75 from ₹95.
A ₹590 crore fraud disclosure led to a 20% stock drop; analysts predict disruptions to CASA, deposit, and loan growth.
